company_name: Tổng Công ty Khí Việt Nam (PV Gas)
market_position: Monopoly gas transporter and largest gas distributor in Vietnam
competitive_position: Natural monopoly on gas infrastructure; regulated pricing
key_narrative: Stable cash flow from regulated monopoly; LNG import growth story; exposed to government pricing policy
provenance: PetroVietnam filings, HOSE filings, government gas pricing regulations
